flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Texas Wesleyan University rose 294% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.6k → $26.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Texas Wesleyan University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.4k → $39.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Texas Wesleyan University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($34.4k → $39.6k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Texas Wesleyan University rose 40% between 2021 and 2024 (17.0% → 23.8%).
